data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Payment allocation against each installment', but the evidence provided does not include any details or data confirming how payments are allocated to each installment. The linked use case specifies the need for payment allocation, yet there is no concrete evidence to support that this requirement is met, indicating a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of payment allocation against each installment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
